posts.author: FdL (Franck de Luca)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Would it be possible in the workload view to add the monthly capacity ?
Actually, we can only choose the capacity as weekly.
In my case, the employees have a monthly task to do and it needs to be followed up.
But i’s very difficult to have a nice monthly view with the capacity divided in weeks.
If I put 0.25 (4 weeks per month), I have this result:

It I put 0.23076923 (12 months/52 weeks), I have this result:

So it would be nice to be able to choose a weekly or a monthly capacity, as to reflect what happens in the real life.

Thanks for taking this into account

Franck
